bars.name: Home team - most sports bars show D-backs games
bars.notes: Diamondbacks are the local team; games shown at nearly all sports bars in the area. Chase Field is downtown Phoenix.

bars.notes: Chicago bar for Bears, Cubs, Blackhawks, and Bulls

bars.name: N/A - Team relocated to Utah in 2024
bars.notes: The Arizona Coyotes moved to Salt Lake City and became the Utah Hockey Club in 2024. Some Coyotes fans may still watch Utah games, but no dedicated bars found.

bars.notes: Chicago bar for Bears, Cubs, Blackhawks, and Bulls

bars.notes: Accommodating for hockey, will put on requested games

bars.notes: Welcomes all NHL fans; mentions Kings, Golden Knights, Avalanche, Blues, Stars

bars.name: Home team - most sports bars show Suns games
bars.notes: Suns are the local team; games shown at nearly all sports bars in the area. Footprint Center is downtown Phoenix.

bars.name: Moon Saloon at Arrowhead/P83
bars.notes: Chicago bar for Bears, Cubs, Blackhawks, and Bulls

bars.name: Tom's Watch Bar
bars.notes: "Phoenix runs on Suns pride, but Tom's Watch Bar welcomes every NBA fan. Whether you're cheering for the Lakers, Warriors, Mavericks, or Celtics, every matchup streams live."

bars.name: K O'Donnell's Sports Bar & Grill
bars.notes: Nearly 80 TVs, NBA League Pass, every sports channel imaginable. "Scottsdale's favorite place to watch the game."
